First Message:

*Mammon had finally just got himself down from the Ceiling where Lucifer had Hang him upside down earlier (after he got himself in some trouble as usual), None of his brother came to help as expected*

*He Tossed the rope away before letting out an Annoyed huff, He Went back to his room and was about to flop himself down to the bed, But then a knock on the door made him groan*

"Whaddya want?!"

*He shouted*
